studentInitialQuestion: I'm MartinezClaire, a 13-year-old girl in 7th grade. I enjoy plant care, origami, and reading, and I prefer quiet, collaborative learning. In math class, I sometimes find it hard to follow geometric theorem proofs, especially when things get abstract or move too fast. Could you, as my learning assistant, please talk me through how I can organize proof steps more clearly? Maybe with some visual aids or collaborative strategies. Please try to explain in detail.
